title: Two independent defects
pressure: Two unrelated failures must be resolved without making the user coordinate parallel work.
prompt: A sporadic login 401 spans the frontend proxy and backend authentication chain. An unrelated CSV export has the wrong column order. Fix both today and minimize user coordination.
expected_invariants: Partition independent reproduction and investigation work.
Keep shared writes and final integration under one accountable owner.
Give each defect root-cause evidence and a focused regression before the affected-module check.
forbidden_behaviors: Let workers edit overlapping files without explicit ownership.
Return raw worker output and make the user reconcile it.
